creator: axel@axel.re
text:
The munin-async and munin-asyncd binaries are not included in any of the munin packages.

Is it possible to have these async tools added to the FreeBSD packages? Maybe a separate package munin-async, as it is for RHEL (EPEL). We are very hapy with running munin-asyncd on all nodes for a faster and better way to gather stats (connection between master and node not needed at all times). 

http://guide.munin-monitoring.org/en/latest/node/async.html
http://guide.munin-monitoring.org/en/latest/reference/munin-async.html
http://guide.munin-monitoring.org/en/latest/reference/munin-asyncd.html

Thanks and keep up the good work.

Best
Axel
